name: Injury Setback
description: You felt something pop during practice. The trainer wants to talk.

responses.text: Shut it down and recover fully
responses.narrative: You sat out and watched. Frustrating but smart. Body feels great now.

responses.risk: Keep your stats going but risk making it worse.
responses.narrative: You gutted it out. Teammates respect the toughness, but you are limping.

responses.risk: Faster recovery but not full rest.
responses.narrative: Rehab went well. Not 100% but functional. One game missed.

name: Depth Chart Shake-Up
description: Coach pulled you aside after practice. Your spot is not guaranteed anymore.

responses.risk: Show them what you've got. Or embarrass yourself trying.
responses.narrative: You went harder than anyone all week. Coaches took notice.

responses.text: Talk to the coach about it
responses.risk: Could get answers or get shut down.
responses.narrative: Coach was honest. You know what you need to fix. No shortcuts.

responses.text: Accept the new role and be a team player
responses.risk: Shows maturity but might cement you as a backup.
responses.narrative: You handled it with class. Teammates respect that. But you are still on the bench.

name: Locker Room Conflict
description: Two teammates got into it after practice. The whole team feels the tension.

responses.risk: Could defuse things or make you a target.
responses.narrative: You pulled them apart and said the right things. Team feels unified again.

responses.risk: Pick a side. Win an ally, make an enemy.
responses.narrative: You made your choice. Half the team agrees with you. The other half does not.
You kept your head down. Drama passed eventually. No one saw you step up though.

name: Personal Crisis
description: Something happened at home. It is weighing on you.

responses.risk: Keep it together. Nobody needs to know.
responses.narrative: You dealt with it on your own. Tough week but you got through it.

responses.text: Lean on your teammates for support
responses.narrative: The guys rallied around you. This team is more than football.

responses.text: Ignore it and focus on football
responses.risk: Might work. Might blow up later.
responses.narrative: You buried yourself in football. It helped on the field but the stress is still there.

name: Rival Emergence
description: One player on the other side of the ball has been running his mouth about you all week.

responses.risk: Focused prep. Could pay off big on game day.
responses.narrative: You watched every snap of their film. You know exactly how to attack.

responses.risk: Fun but dangerous. Bulletin board material.
responses.narrative: Social media is exploding. Your teammates are hyped. Your coaches are not.

responses.text: Let your play do the talking
responses.narrative: You said nothing. Then went out and dominated. That is the best answer.
